title: Stech Email Tone Improver (Batch)
description: Rewrite multiple emails to be warm, honest, and personal using Stech AI. Upload a CSV file or provide an array of emails.

csvFile.title: CSV File
csvFile.description: Upload a CSV file with columns: originalEmail (required), targetTone (optional), additionalInstructions (optional).

emails.title: Emails Array (Alternative)
emails.description: If you prefer JSON, provide an array of email objects.

prefill.originalEmail: Dear Sir, your application has been rejected.

defaultTone.title: Default Tone
defaultTone.description: Fallback tone if not specified per email.

maxConcurrency.title: Max Concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Number of emails to process simultaneously (1-20).

timeout.title: Timeout (seconds)
timeout.description: Max wait time per email request.
